backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of frosted-glass CTA buttons in Hero.tsx with high confidence, referencing test ID REQ-12.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key design details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark mode design tokens including colors, borders, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the STA Sea Foods React app, mounting the app at the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles Navigation, Hero, Services, Location, Contact, and Footer into a single-page layout with anchor section IDs.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section displaying phone, email, and business hours cards with clickable links, plus a navy CTA banner with wave background pattern.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, full address, phone/email links, quick navigation links, services list, and a dynamic copyright year on a navy background.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-viewport hero section featuring a background image with navy gradient overlay, animated wave SVG, seafoam-gradient heading, and two frosted-glass CTA buttons with backdrop-blur and semi-transparent borders.
frontend/src/components/Location.tsx: Location section embedding an OpenStreetMap iframe centered on the facility's coordinates in Thuckalay, Tamil Nadu, with address details, operating hours, and wave decorators.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar for STA Sea Foods with smooth scroll links, a logo, desktop nav buttons, and a mobile sheet drawer that collapses on link click.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Renders a 6-card services grid showcasing cold storage offerings (e.g., temperature monitoring, distribution, quality assurance) with icons, highlights, and hover animations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor via React Query, returning an anonymous or identity-authenticated actor and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state, persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base layers, CSS custom properties for a maritime color palette (navy/seafoam), and utility classes for wave dividers and text gradients.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom navy, seafoam, and sand color scales using OKLCH, custom box shadows, border radii, and font families, plus typography and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state, version, and feature list for the STA Sea Foods single-page website, including all implemented features like navigation, services, location, contact, and theming.
